findings.message: Using ENV or ARG to handle secrets is security-sensitive. Secrets defined in ENV or ARG instructions are stored in the image metadata and can be extracted from the image layers, even if removed later. Use Docker secrets, BuildKit secret mounts (--mount=type=secret), or pass secrets at runtime instead of embedding them in the image.

Using ENV or ARG to handle secrets is security-sensitive. Use Docker secrets, BuildKit secret mounts (--mount=type=secret), or pass secrets at runtime instead of embedding them in the image.
